subject: FW: tax form
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Sunday, March 09, 2008 12:35 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: tax form


Dear Lesley,

I was not sure to whom I should write about this, but I am writing to
inquire about the payment I received from Jeffrey last spring after the
conference arranged on St John. I received a gift that will not be
taxed, but also a bonus for which I will need a 1099M. I have not yet
received this form (whether because it went to the wrong address or has
not been sent, yet), but I would be most grateful if it could be sent to
the following address at your earliest convenience: 

Laura Abbott
c/o Preston Abbott
161 Dunk Rock Rd
Guilford, CT 06437

Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns. I believe I
should still have record of this transaction, though it may take me a
little time to locate, so please let me know as soon as possible if you
require any further information. 


Many thanks,
Laura Abbott
